message.body: is obs using the wrong mic? its picking a lot of static
yeah its using the discord mic instead of whatever you use on stream
if it aint broke, don't fix it

try it with some enemies on the screen
you're flying through this stage, holy moly...
yeah well, we'll see about that
oh... I missed you were streaming
i personally went with the red outfit for the bosses cuz the other ones felt harder to get good damage with, even if their dps may be higher some were kinda distracting
can't you slow down your movement with other characters? should be able to hold shift and do that
yeah this costume gets some random auto bombs I think
yeah that attack is crazy LMAO
its so hard to communicate that it's switching the first time you get there, i love the attack but it fucks you up losing a couple of attempts trying to understand and dodge everything
I spent most of the fight holding jump
its a big jump in difficulty
oh you know what's coming next and it ain't solo

honestly there's stuff i had made for dldc that got cut and im just sitting on a practically finished game, its easily some of the work im proudest of, i just need to get the drive to wrap it up in a presentable state of its own
TFW you live and you learn
ops, meant to type that in lingo
the ball attack is rough, probably the least consistent one for me
the ball is p overwhelming, the goatse laser used to be the hardest for the judges tho
a great man i used to know once said: "Win" i think you can take some notes from him, kale
can we get a hype train going for this attempt?
here's how kale can still win
ok ok, i'll take you up on that...
wow this song syncs up so well with this boss
hes going mr. bell beast mode
still had a bomb I guess...
that bomb is gonna haunt you one day in your life
one more for the good guys
oh i guess i do then
that's so nice of him to sleep with his fans

as baby keem would say, what's the pros and the cons of this next check...
you got the strap, some could say
Dog had run away.. I found him
as in, nice that you found him
dog is back, mind refreshed, time to lock in
huh, seems like you gain bombs sometimes
not sure if it's when you die without having any?
yeah you had a bomb when you died, even after using 2 in the first part
i have not, but i did watch echo's whole playthrough
i guess I played like four random stages actually
one thing i dont think they made clear was you get both bombs back every life
idk why the hell u thought it was renex
so you could just aggressively bomb and lose life
msk was the main maker for this, kingluiz made the background iirc
there's some needle anti bias in the difficulty meter
im surprised the atmosphere is so high for some judges. i feel like being fully brown block and all the same for such a long stage fell a little flat
I think a lot of it comes down to the care in the boss visuals and all the little details with the costumes and such
was secret content supppose to be included in judging or excluded, or no certain rule?
up to the judge I think
the atmosphere for me was top notch in the bosses, specially the secret and the secret boss
skull is just a lover of games. cant bash all his 30s
stuff like the slash dash animation is what kind of elevates the atmosphere for me, there's just a lot of care in those details
the final attack is awesome to dodge, but it's very mean to put it at the end lol
this stage didnt make me feel like a touhou...
the dash gives you iframes, can save you when you get cornered
i not once felt like a panda eating bamboo and watching touhous fly by...
reimu is also the only one with the random chance to ignore hits
grab a brush and put a little makeup
but once you adapt... ho boy
just imagine you're playing hollow knight
i'm afraid that once again, i do not feel like i'm in a bamboo forest. . .
you are hornet and you're making your way through the hunter's march
sometimes you have to accept the gimmick is the dom and you're the sub, kale
i've seen someone else go down and not trigger it
up and down are your friends, not your enemies
finally the common fools are getting punished for poor control schemes
this is up there in terms of touhou songs for me
alright kale lets hear it, top 5 touhou songs
what buttons do you use for jump and shoot?
ah, I guess you use middle finger on shift
i just alternate my index finger with shoot and dash, works like a beaut
i use X to jump and C to dash so it's a lot more natural for me
i started out with my pinky but that did not last very long back in the day
i aint even gonna say nothin', i'd be worried they said somethin'...
there can only be one square

unless you're in a QWERTZ keyboard?
yeah in that case it's next to Y

it was just harder to parse the intended path
i removed all shell jumps in revised
yeah thats one of the biggest changes
there were a fair few in original, only one of which was required i think
but also i dont think it was necessary for the shells to be there in the first place, the dash was already so much to explore
i think it got in the way
